description: Add equipment with detailed specifications including PAT test, location, and expiry
prompt: Add a new Makita SDS Drill with serial number MK-2024-001 to Bay A3, it was PAT tested yesterday and expires in 6 months

expected.equipment: create equipment: name=Makita SDS Drill, manufacturer=Makita, serial_number=MK-2024-001, area=Bay A3, verification_type=PAT TESTED, expires_on=6 months from now
